question: What are the template ids of any templates used in more than a single document?
gold_sql: SELECT template_id FROM Documents GROUP BY template_id HAVING count(*)  >  1
predicted_sql: SELECT attr_66f618_key FROM documents GROUP BY attr_66f618_key HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
raw_response: SELECT attr_66f618_key FROM documents GROUP BY attr_66f618_key HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
